texto: As a physician and as a pilot, I think it lets me be a pretty good translator having one foot in the medical world and one foot in the flying world. Sometimes when the medical guys come in and speak medical stuff to the pilots, the pilots really don't know what they're saying.
explicacao: Citação de David M. Brown sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “As a physician and as a pilot, I think it lets me be a pretty good translator having one foot in …” articula reflexao, good, world em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como world e speak.
